title: Mental health services - Canada.ca
content:
## Mental health services
Support for those in crisis, including Indigenous peoples, veterans, Canadian Armed Forces members and federal employees.

## Services and information

### Get mental health support
Find a crisis centre or phone number, talk to someone if you're in crisis and need emotional support

### Wellness in First Nations and Inuit communities
Factors that can influence positive mental health, services to help prevent suicide in Indigenous communities
Support to help veterans experiencing mental health issues

### Canadian Armed Forces members and families
Mental health services and programs for members of the Canadian Armed Forces
Mental health services for members of federal departments, agencies and organizations

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
